## Checklist

- [ ] `zola build` and `zola check` pass locally with no warnings.
- [ ] If this PR touches `themes/tapestry/**`, `content/warp-and-weft/**`, `tests/**`, or `config.toml`: the "Visual & accessibility tests" workflow is green.
- [ ] Performed a manual keyboard-only spot-check on at least one presentation style/variant (CONSTITUTION.md §1) — tab through the nav, theme toggle, and (if enabled) the style switcher without a mouse.
- [ ] If any visual regression baseline changed intentionally, the "Update visual regression baselines" workflow was run and its PR reviewed/merged first.
